parameters.subject: =Gentle Remainder To pay for the order no : {{ $json.order_id }}
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json.first_name }},

We hope you are doing well.

This is a gentle reminder that payment for your order {{ $json.order_id }} is still pending. To proceed with processing and shipping your order, please complete the payment at your earliest convenience.

Once the payment is successfully received, we will immediately begin processing your order and keep you updated on the shipping status.

If you have already completed the payment, please ignore this message.

Should you need any assistance or have questions regarding your order, feel free to contact our support team.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team

parameters.text:
=Order ID {{ $('Switch').item.json.order_id }} is in Pending Status for long time.

Remainder Email has been sent to the Customer.

If Payment is not done in within 24 hrs order will be auto cancelled.

parameters.subject: =Gentle Remainder To pay for the order no :{{ $('Get row(s) in sheet').item.json.order_id }}
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $('Switch').item.json.first_name }},
We hope you are doing well.

This is a second reminder regarding your order {{ $('Get row(s) in sheet').item.json.order_id }}, which is currently awaiting payment.

To avoid cancellation, please complete the payment within 24 hours of placing the order. If the payment is not received within this time frame, the order will be automatically cancelled.

You can complete your payment using the link below:

Payment Link: 

If you have already completed the payment, please ignore this message.

If you need any assistance, feel free to contact our support team. We are happy to help.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team

parameters.subject: =Order No : {{ $json.order_id }} Cancelled due to pending payment
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json.first_name }},

We hope you are doing well.

Since we did not receive the payment for your order {{ $json.order_id }} within 24 hours of placing the order, the order has now been automatically cancelled.

If you still wish to purchase the items, you are welcome to place a new order at any time through our website.

If you believe this cancellation was made in error or if you have any questions, please feel free to contact our support team and we will be happy to assist you.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team

parameters.text:

parameters.subject: Your Order Has Been Shipped 🚚
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.first_name }},

Good news! Your order {{ $json.order_id }}  has been shipped and is on its way.

📦 Tracking Details:

Carrier: DHL
Tracking Number: {{ $json['Tracking Number'] }}
Track your package: {{ $json['Tracking URL'] }}

You can use the tracking link above to follow your shipment in real time.

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email — we’re happy to help!

Thank you for shopping with us 😊

Best regards,
Shipping Team
